narrative:
Union Township C1C (precinct in Clermont County) has 927 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.3 percentage points.
